name: terrain_gen
creator: squarepoint
description: A nice 3d ish terrain generator that uses my fake perlin algorithm (it’s actually called blur noise iirc). Move with arrows, press ok to generate a new map, zoom with + and -, you can also raise or lower the water level but i forgor the keys for it. Yeah the height isn’t synced w/ the zoom but i’m too lazy to rewrite the whole thing, have fun :D
